es.title: Video: Piel
es.description: No podrías vivir sin la piel que te rodea. Descubre qué ocurre debajo de la piel en este video.

en.title: How Does the Skin Work? (Video)
en.description: How Does the Skin Work? What Does Skin Do? You couldn't live without the skin you're in. Find out what's going on under the surface in the skin video.
